title: OpenCitations'  steps towards sustainability
author: Di Giambattista, Chiara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Slide presentation of the talk by Chiara Di Giambattista (Communications Director at OpenCitations) on the OpenCitations sustainability model, delivered within Working Group 5 “Sustaining Infrastructures” of the Barcelona Declaration on Open research Information together with Claudio Fabbri (Research Manager).
steps_raw: Slide presentation of the talk by Chiara Di Giambattista (Communications Director at OpenCitations) on the OpenCitations sustainability model, delivered within Working Group 5 “Sustaining Infrastructures” of the Barcelona Declaration on Open research Information together with Claudio Fabbri (Research Manager).
